original: “There is one and only one social responsibility of business,” wrote Milton Friedman, a Nobel prize-winning economist, “That is, to use its resources and engage in activities designed to increase its profits.”
translation_literal: 诺贝尔奖经济学家米尔顿·弗里德曼写道：“企业有且只有一个社会责任。那就是使用其资源并从事旨在增加利润的活动。”

chunks.english: one and only one social responsibility of business
chunks.chinese: 企业有且只有一个社会责任
chunks.relation: 第一段引语的真实主语

chunks.english: wrote Milton Friedman, a Nobel prize-winning economist
chunks.chinese: 诺贝尔奖经济学家米尔顿·弗里德曼写道
chunks.relation: 引语后的倒装报道结构

chunks.chinese: 一位诺贝尔奖经济学家
chunks.relation: 解释 Milton Friedman 的身份

chunks.english: That is, to use its resources and engage in activities designed to increase its profits
chunks.chinese: 那就是使用其资源并从事旨在增加利润的活动
chunks.relation: 解释前面 one responsibility 的具体内容

chunks.english: engage in activities designed to increase its profits
chunks.chinese: 从事旨在增加利润的活动

sentence_patterns.explanation: wrote Milton Friedman 是引语后的倒装报道结构。
That is 后面解释 business 的唯一社会责任是什么。

original: But even if you accept Friedman’s premise and regard corporate social responsibility (CSR) policies as a waste of shareholders’ money, things may not be absolutely clear-cut.
translation_literal: 但是，即使你接受弗里德曼的前提，并把企业社会责任政策看作股东资金的浪费，事情也可能并非绝对清楚。

chunks.english: even if you accept Friedman’s premise and regard corporate social responsibility policies as a waste of shareholders’ money
chunks.chinese: 即使你接受弗里德曼的前提并把企业社会责任政策看作股东资金的浪费
chunks.relation: 说明主句判断成立的让步条件
作 may not be 的表语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: even if + 主语 + accept... and regard...
sentence_patterns.explanation: even if 从句中 accept 和 regard 是并列谓语，共同描述让步条件。

original: New research suggests that CSR may create monetary value for companies — at least when they are prosecuted for corruption.
translation_literal: 新研究表明，企业社会责任可能为公司创造货币价值，至少在它们因腐败被起诉时是这样。

chunks.english: that CSR may create monetary value for companies
chunks.chinese: 企业社会责任可能为公司创造货币价值

chunks.english: when they are prosecuted for corruption
chunks.chinese: 当它们因腐败被起诉时
chunks.relation: 限定 CSR 创造价值的情形
when 从句内部主语，指 companies

original: The largest firms in America and Britain together spend more than $15 billion a year on CSR, according to an estimate by EPG, a consulting firm.
translation_literal: 根据咨询公司EPG的一项估计，美国和英国最大的公司合计每年在企业社会责任上花费超过150亿美元。

chunks.english: The largest firms in America and Britain
chunks.chinese: 美国和英国最大的公司

chunks.english: according to an estimate by EPG, a consulting firm
chunks.chinese: 根据咨询公司EPG的一项估计

sentence_patterns.explanation: according to... 是来源插入语，不影响主干 firms spend...。

original: This could add value to their businesses in three ways.
translation_literal: 这可以通过三种方式为它们的业务增加价值。

original: First, consumers may take CSR spending as a “signal” that a company’s products are of high quality.
translation_literal: 首先，消费者可能把企业社会责任支出看作一个“信号”，即一家公司的产品质量很高。

chunks.relation: 补充说明 CSR spending 被看作什么

chunks.english: that a company’s products are of high quality
chunks.chinese: 即一家公司的产品质量很高
chunks.relation: 解释 signal 的具体内容

sentence_patterns.explanation: that 从句解释 signal 传递的具体信息。

original: Second, customers may be willing to buy a company’s products as an indirect way to donate to the good causes it helps.
translation_literal: 第二，顾客可能愿意购买一家公司的产品，把这作为一种间接向它所帮助的公益事业捐赠的方式。

chunks.english: as an indirect way to donate to the good causes it helps
chunks.chinese: 作为一种间接向它所帮助的公益事业捐赠的方式

chunks.english: to donate to the good causes it helps
chunks.chinese: 向它所帮助的公益事业捐赠的

chunks.relation: 定语从句内部主语，指 company

original: And third, through a more diffuse “halo effect,” whereby its good deeds earn it greater consideration from consumers and others.
translation_literal: 第三，通过一种更分散的“光环效应”，即它的善行使它从消费者和其他人那里获得更多考虑。

chunks.english: through a more diffuse halo effect
chunks.chinese: 通过一种更分散的光环效应

chunks.english: whereby its good deeds earn it greater consideration from consumers and others
chunks.chinese: 借此它的善行使它从消费者和其他人那里获得更多考虑
chunks.relation: 解释 halo effect 的运作方式

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.explanation: whereby 从句解释 halo effect 的具体机制。

original: Previous studies on CSR have had trouble differentiating these effects because consumers can be affected by all three.
translation_literal: 以往关于企业社会责任的研究难以区分这些效果，因为消费者可能受到这三者共同影响。

chunks.chinese: 以往关于企业社会责任的研究

chunks.english: because consumers can be affected by all three
chunks.chinese: 因为消费者可能受到这三者共同影响

original: A recent study attempts to separate them by looking at bribery prosecutions under America’s Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA).
translation_literal: 一项近期研究试图通过考察美国《反海外腐败法》下的贿赂起诉来分离这些效果。

chunks.relation: 作 separate 的宾语，指前文三种效果

chunks.english: by looking at bribery prosecutions under America’s Foreign Corrupt Practices Act
chunks.chinese: 通过考察美国反海外腐败法下的贿赂起诉

original: It argues that since prosecutors do not consume a company’s products as part of their investigations, they could be influenced only by the halo effect.
translation_literal: 它认为，由于检察官在调查中并不消费公司的产品，他们可能只会受到光环效应的影响。

chunks.english: that since prosecutors do not consume a company’s products as part of their investigations, they could be influenced only by the halo effect
chunks.chinese: 由于检察官不消费公司产品，他们可能只受光环效应影响

chunks.english: since prosecutors do not consume a company’s products as part of their investigations
chunks.chinese: 由于检察官在调查中不消费公司产品
chunks.relation: 说明他们只受光环效应影响的原因
宾语从句主句内部主语，指 prosecutors
宾语从句主句内部谓语

original: The study found that, among prosecuted firms, those with the most comprehensive CSR programmes tended to get more lenient penalties.
translation_literal: 该研究发现，在被起诉的公司中，那些拥有最全面企业社会责任项目的公司往往获得更宽大的处罚。

chunks.english: that those with the most comprehensive CSR programmes tended to get more lenient penalties
chunks.chinese: 那些拥有最全面CSR项目的公司往往获得更宽大的处罚

chunks.english: those with the most comprehensive CSR programmes
chunks.chinese: 那些拥有最全面CSR项目的公司

original: Their analysis ruled out the possibility that it was firms’ political influence, rather than their CSR stand, that accounted for the leniency: Companies that contributed more to political campaigns did not receive lower fines.
translation_literal: 他们的分析排除了这样一种可能性：导致宽大处理的是公司的政治影响力而不是其CSR立场；向政治竞选捐款更多的公司并没有得到更低罚款。

chunks.relation: 作 ruled out 的宾语

chunks.english: that it was firms’ political influence, rather than their CSR stand, that accounted for the leniency
chunks.chinese: 即是公司的政治影响力而不是CSR立场解释了宽大处理
chunks.relation: 解释 possibility 的具体内容

chunks.english: it was firms’ political influence, rather than their CSR stand, that
chunks.chinese: 正是公司的政治影响力而不是CSR立场
chunks.relation: 强调 accounted for 的主语

chunks.english: firms’ political influence, rather than their CSR stand
chunks.chinese: 公司的政治影响力而不是CSR立场
chunks.relation: 同位语从句内部被强调主语
作 accounted for 的宾语

chunks.english: Companies that contributed more to political campaigns did not receive lower fines
chunks.chinese: 向政治竞选捐款更多的公司并没有得到更低罚款
chunks.relation: 冒号后补充说明分析依据

chunks.english: Companies that contributed more to political campaigns
chunks.chinese: 向政治竞选捐款更多的公司

chunks.english: that contributed more to political campaigns
chunks.chinese: 向政治竞选捐款更多的

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: it was A, rather than B, that...
sentence_patterns.explanation: 同位语从句中使用强调句，强调 accounted for leniency 的不是 CSR stand 而是 political influence。
that 从句解释 possibility 的内容。

original: In all, the study concludes that whereas prosecutors should only evaluate a case based on its merits, they do seem to be influenced by a company’s record in CSR.
translation_literal: 总之，该研究得出结论：尽管检察官只应根据案件本身的是非曲直来评估案件，但他们似乎确实受到公司CSR记录的影响。

chunks.english: that whereas prosecutors should only evaluate a case based on its merits, they do seem to be influenced by a company’s record in CSR
chunks.chinese: 尽管检察官只应基于案件本身评估案件，但他们似乎确实受公司CSR记录影响

chunks.english: whereas prosecutors should only evaluate a case based on its merits
chunks.chinese: 尽管检察官只应基于案件本身评估案件

chunks.relation: 宾语从句主句内部主语
宾语从句主句内部谓语

chunks.english: by a company’s record in CSR

original: “We estimate that either eliminating a substantial labour-rights concern, such as child labour, or increasing corporate giving by about 20% results in fines that generally are 40% lower than the typical punishment for bribing foreign officials,” says one researcher.
translation_literal: 一位研究者说：“我们估计，消除一项重大的劳工权利问题，例如童工，或者把企业捐赠增加约20%，会导致罚款通常比贿赂外国官员的典型处罚低40%。”

chunks.english: that either eliminating a substantial labour-rights concern, such as child labour, or increasing corporate giving by about 20% results in fines that generally are 40% lower than the typical punishment for bribing foreign officials
chunks.chinese: 消除重大劳工权利问题或增加企业捐赠会导致罚款降低

chunks.english: either eliminating a substantial labour-rights concern, such as child labour
chunks.chinese: 消除一项重大劳工权利问题例如童工
chunks.relation: 宾语从句内部第一并列主语

chunks.english: or increasing corporate giving by about 20%
chunks.chinese: 或者把企业捐赠增加约20%
chunks.relation: 宾语从句内部第二并列主语

chunks.english: fines that generally are 40% lower than the typical punishment for bribing foreign officials
chunks.chinese: 通常比贿赂外国官员的典型处罚低40%的罚款
chunks.relation: 作 results in 的宾语

chunks.english: that generally are 40% lower than the typical punishment for bribing foreign officials
chunks.chinese: 通常比贿赂外国官员的典型处罚低40%的

chunks.english: 40% lower than the typical punishment for bribing foreign officials
chunks.chinese: 比贿赂外国官员的典型处罚低40%

chunks.relation: 引语后的倒装报道结构

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: either doing A or doing B + results in...
sentence_patterns.explanation: 两个动名词短语并列作宾语从句主语，共同对应谓语 results in。
says one researcher 是引语后的倒装报道结构。

original: Researchers admit that their study does not answer the question of how much businesses ought to spend on CSR.
translation_literal: 研究人员承认，他们的研究没有回答企业应该在CSR上花多少钱这个问题。

chunks.english: that their study does not answer the question of how much businesses ought to spend on CSR
chunks.chinese: 他们的研究没有回答企业应该在CSR上花多少钱这个问题

chunks.english: the question of how much businesses ought to spend on CSR
chunks.chinese: 企业应该在CSR上花多少钱这个问题

chunks.english: how much businesses ought to spend on CSR
chunks.chinese: 企业应该在CSR上花多少钱

original: Nor does it reveal how much companies are banking on the halo effect, rather than the other possible benefits, when they decide their do-gooding policies.
translation_literal: 它也没有揭示，当公司决定其行善政策时，它们多大程度上依赖光环效应，而不是其他可能的好处。

chunks.relation: 否定倒装结构中的主语
否定倒装结构中的谓语，Nor 使助动词前置

chunks.english: how much companies are banking on the halo effect, rather than the other possible benefits
chunks.chinese: 公司多大程度上依赖光环效应而不是其他可能好处

chunks.relation: how much 宾语从句内部主语
how much 宾语从句内部谓语
作 banking on 的宾语

chunks.english: rather than the other possible benefits
chunks.chinese: 而不是其他可能的好处
chunks.relation: 与 halo effect 形成对比

chunks.english: when they decide their do-gooding policies
chunks.chinese: 当它们决定其行善政策时
chunks.relation: 说明依赖光环效应发生的时间

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: Nor + 助动词 + 主语 + 谓语
sentence_patterns.explanation: Nor 位于句首引起部分倒装，正常语序是 it does not reveal...。

original: But at least they have demonstrated that when companies get into trouble with the law, evidence of good character can win them a less costly punishment.
translation_literal: 但至少他们已经证明，当公司陷入法律麻烦时，良好品格的证据能够为它们赢得成本较低的处罚。

chunks.english: that when companies get into trouble with the law, evidence of good character can win them a less costly punishment
chunks.chinese: 当公司陷入法律麻烦时良好品格证据能赢得较低成本处罚

chunks.english: when companies get into trouble with the law
chunks.chinese: 当公司陷入法律麻烦时
chunks.relation: 说明证据发挥作用的时间
作 get into 的宾语
宾语从句主句内部主语
宾语从句主句内部谓语

chunks.chinese: 为它们赢得成本较低的处罚

key_phrases.phrase: get into trouble with the law
